content.speakerText: Your refund is processed. You'll get a receipt.
content.speakerTextCn: 您的退税已处理，这是收据。
expectedAnswers: Thanks so much! I'll keep this for my records.
Great, thanks! I'll make sure to save the receipt.
Appreciate it! I'll check it against my bank statement.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：回应了收据信息并表达感谢
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当
表达自然度：符合英语口语习惯，语气礼貌
关键词覆盖：使用了 'receipt' 或 'keep/save' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: If you have any issues, call this number.
content.speakerTextCn: 如有问题，请拨打这个电话。
expectedAnswers: Got it, I'll save it in my contacts right away.
Thanks — I've already added it to my phone.
I'll write it down so I don't lose it.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确确认并承诺保存号码，而非仅说谢谢
语言准确性：动词使用正确（save, add, write down）
表达自然度：符合日常英语口语习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了 'save', 'number', 'phone', 'contact' 等关键词

content.speakerText: Your refund of $189 has been successfully credited to your account.
content.speakerTextCn: 您的189美元退款已成功存入账户。
expectedAnswers: Perfect, thank you! I'll check my account later and reach out if there's a discrepancy.
Thanks! I'll keep the confirmation email just in case.
That's great news — I appreciate your help!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：确认退款完成并表达感谢，体现主动性
语言准确性：使用恰当的时态和词汇（credited, discrepancy, confirmation）
表达自然度：语气真诚、符合商务/服务场景的礼貌风格
关键词覆盖：使用了 'refund', 'credited', 'confirmation', 'discrepancy' 等核心词汇
